org.apache.dubbo.common

接口 Node

  • 所有已知子接口:
    ClusterInvoker<T>, Directory<T>, Directory<T>, Invoker<T>, Invoker<T>, MigrationClusterInvoker<T>, Monitor, Monitor, Registry, Registry
    所有已知实现类:
    AbstractClusterInvoker, AbstractDirectory, AbstractInvoker, AbstractProxyInvoker, AbstractRegistry, AbstractRegistry, AsyncToSyncInvoker, AvailableClusterInvoker, BroadcastCluster2Invoker, BroadcastClusterInvoker, ConsulRegistry, DelegateProviderMetaDataInvoker, DubboInvoker, DubboMonitor, DubboRegistry, DynamicDirectory, EtcdRegistry, FailbackClusterInvoker, FailbackRegistry, FailbackRegistry, FailfastClusterInvoker, FailoverClusterInvoker, FailsafeClusterInvoker, ForkingClusterInvoker, GrpcInvoker, Invoker.CompatibleInvoker, InvokerWrapper, ListenerInvokerWrapper, ListenerRegistryWrapper, MergeableClusterInvoker, MigrationInvoker, MockClusterInvoker, MockInvoker, MulticastRegistry, MultipleRegistry, NacosRegistry, RedisRegistry, RegistryDirectory, RegistryProtocol.InvokerDelegate, ServiceDiscoveryMigrationInvoker, ServiceDiscoveryRegistry, ServiceDiscoveryRegistryDirectory, SofaRegistry, StaticDirectory, ThriftInvoker, ZoneAwareClusterInvoker, ZookeeperRegistry

    public interface Node
    Node. (API/SPI, Prototype, ThreadSafe)
